issues.sample: The contact owns a 2014 Mercedes-Benz G63. The contact stated that while his fiancé was parking the vehicle, the steering wheel would turn however, the wheels would not respond. The dealer was made aware of the failure but provided no assistance. The vehicle was towed to an indep

narrative.headline: What 2014 Mercedes-Benz G-Class owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports).

issues.title: Steering
